calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Off Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-20-16

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court issued a late tentative ruling. The parties informed the Court by way of e-mail that the tentative ruling was acceptable. The Court confirmed its tenative ruling. Plaintiff Kurt Hobson's demurrer to the answer filed by defendant Samuel Sutch is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. While a demurrer to an answer is disfavored by most trial courts because it is usually of little or no utility, this is a case where such a demurrer makes sense. Defendant's conclusory pleading of 38 affirmative defenses to a simple nonpayment for services contract claim seeking less than $20,000 in damages suggests that defendant either lacks any basis for all or most of the affirmative defenses or has pled the defenses to increase the cost of this litigation. In either event the answer runs afoul of the purposes and spirit of the Economic Litigation for Limited Civil Cases rules. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
